titlestmt.titleproper: Finding Aid for the Elyse Robert collection on Ruth St. Denis, 1932-1991
Robert (Elyse) collection on Ruth St. Denis
titlestmt.author: Processed by Kelley Wolfe Bachli in the Center for Primary Research and Training (CFPRT), 2009; machine-readable finding aid created by Caroline Cubé.

publicationstmt.publisher: UCLA Library, Department of Special Collections

address.addressline: Room A1713, Charles E. Young Research Library

publicationstmt.p: The Regents of the University of California. All rights reserved.

profiledesc.creation: Machine-readable finding aid derived from database containing container list structure and data, encoding added via MS Access and Notetab Pro; Date of source: 2009;. Supplementary encoding and revision supplied by Caroline Cubé.
profiledesc.descrules: Finding aid prepared using Describing Archives: a Content Standard

did.head: Descriptive Summary
did.unittitle: Elyse Robert collection on Ruth St. Denis
did.abstract: Elyse Robert (1901-1993) danced for Ruth St. Denis' Church of the Divine Dance between 1934 and 1968. During this time, Robert performed with Ruth St. Denis (1880-1968), a pioneer of modern dance, for many events and in numerous churches in the Los Angeles area. Collection includes dance costumes, correspondence, programs, photographs, and notes about Ruth St. Denis performances.
did.langmaterial: Finding aid is written in English.

repository.label: Repository
repository.corpname: University of California, Los Angeles. Library. Department of Special Collections.

did.physloc: Box 4 stored off-site at SRLF. Boxes 1-3 stored on-site. Advance notice is required for access to the collection. Please contact the UCLA Library, Department of Special Collections Reference Desk for paging information.

accessrestrict.head: Restrictions on Access
accessrestrict.p: COLLECTION STORED OFF-SITE AT SRLF: Open for research. Advance notice required for access. Contact the UCLA Library, Department of Special Collections Reference Desk for paging information.

userestrict.head: Restrictions on Use and Reproduction
userestrict.p: Property rights to the physical object belong to the UCLA Library, Department of Special Collections. Literary rights, including copyright, are retained by the creators and their heirs. It is the responsibility of the researcher to determine who holds the copyright and pursue the copyright owner or his or her heir for permission to publish where The UC Regents do not hold the copyright.

processinfo.head: Processing Note
processinfo.p: Processed by Kelley Wolfe Bachli in the Center for Primary Research and Training (CFPRT), 2009.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: [Identification of item], Elyse Robert collection on Ruth St. Denis (Collection 1735). Department of Special Collections, Charles E. Young Research Library, UCLA.

bioghist.head: Biography
bioghist.p: Elyse Robert (1901-1993) danced for Ruth St. Denis' Church of the Divine Dance between 1934 and 1968. During this time, Robert performed with Ruth St. Denis (1880-1968), a pioneer of modern dance, for many events and in numerous churches in the Los Angeles area.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Content
scopecontent.p: Collection includes material by and about Elyse Robert and Ruth St. Denis, including correspondence, programs, photographs, and notes about Ruth St. Denis dances and costumes. Boxes 1-3 in the collection contain costumes that belonged to Elyse Robert and were probably used in her dance performance with Ruth St. Denis. Box 4 contains photographs of dancers, newspaper clippings, programs, and dance choreography.

list.item: Boxes 1-3: costumes that belonged to Elyse Robert and were probably used in her dance performance with Ruth St. Denis.
Box 4: photographs of dancers, newspaper clippings, programs, and dance choreography.

controlaccess.head: Indexing Terms
controlaccess.p: The following terms have been used to index the description of this collection in the library's online public access catalog.

relatedmaterial.head: Related Material
relatedmaterial.p: Ruth St. Denis Papers (Collection 1031) . Department of Special Collections, Charles E. Young Research Library, University of California, Los Angeles.

did.unittitle: White floor length, long sleeve gown with weighted bottom hem

note.p: Boxes 1-3 are stored in the B-level stacks on top of Rare Books, Range 15.

note.p: Boxes 1-3 are stored in the B-level stacks on top of Rare Books, Range 15.

did.unittitle: Photographs of Ruth St. Denis and other dancers. Many of the photographs are inscribed to Elyse Robert. 29 photographs and 2 negatives.
Photocopies of photographs of Ruth St. Denis and other dancers.
Newspaper clippings of advertisements and article critiques about Ruth St. Denis performances
Poems, some by Ruth St. Denis, many unattributed
Correspondence to Elyse Robert
Dance choreography
Ruth St. Denis and Elyse Robert dance programs
Writings by Ruth St. Denis and Elyse Robert
Religious images, pamphlets and printed material
Society of Spiritual Arts programs and informational handout
Scrapbook of poems, hand written programs, clipping, and Winter 1993 issue of Sacred Dance Guild Journal
Elyse Robert obituary and 2 photographs
